title: Boot Up
overview: Takumi is an anime-obsessed recluse with a fetish for two dimensional girls. His dirty little cyber secrets land him in real-life trouble after a chatroom encounter with the mysterious General.

title: Ego
overview: Takumi fears he may be losing his mind after finding the pink-haired girl from the murder scene sitting next to him in class. To make matters even worse, someone keeps snooping around his house.

title: Contact
overview: A chilling flashback to a tragedy from his younger days sheds light on Takumi’s reclusive existence. Back in the present, he attends a concert given by a clairvoyant performer.

title: Commencing
overview: Haunted by visions of young girls carrying swords, Takumi begins to search for a weapon of his own. His frantic quest is complicated by an unwanted visit from the police.

title: Guidance
overview: As the police continue to investigate him, Takumi learns the secrets of the Di-Sword from Ayase, and a cyber friend sends him a video that sheds light on the New Gen case.

title: Embracement
overview: Takumi grows dependent on Rimi’s calming presences as he struggles to discover the power of his own Di-Sword, and a cryptic phone call shakes the city to its core.

title: Realization
overview: Takumi is rescued from a group of hired thugs by a classmate with telepathic abilities. After regaining consciousness, he learns the identity of the evil mastermind behind the earthquake.

title: Linkage
overview: The Gigalomaniac Trio embarks on a daring mission to destroy Noah II, but their enemy remains a step ahead, ambushing the would-be heroes with their own worst nightmares.

title: Rejection
overview: Yua goes to the police with information concerning Takumi, who receives a disturbing call for help from his little sister. Meanwhile, another New Gen incident occurs!

title: Purification
overview: Takumi realizes the horrific truth about his troubled existence, Yua confronts the delusion of her dead sister, and Rimi attempts to rescue Nanami.

title: Independence
overview: The General and Takumi meet face-to-face to discuss their shared existence. Later, after awakening his Di-Sword, Takumi goes underground for a showdown with an artificial gigalomaniac!

title: Mission
overview: Takumi finally realizes his ultimate destiny: to destroy Noah II. But first, he must conquer the illusion of fear and defeat the one man standing in his way.
